rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order Determining Prevailing Party On Appeal And Fixing Attorney'S Fees Recoverable As Costs
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Friday, December 30, 2022, Line 1, RESPONDENT MARK EPSTEIN, SAMETC, LLC, SEILER EPSTEIN ZIEGLER & APPLEGATE, LLP Motion For Order Determining Prevailing Party On Appeal And Fixing Attorney'S Fees Recoverable As Costs Respondent's Motion for Determination of Prevailing Party on Appeal is continued to April 20, 2023 pending appeal. = (501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: SOCRATES MAMAKOS VS. LARESA BROWN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Friday, December 30, 2022, Line 4, DEFENDANT LARESA BROWN'S Motion For Attorneys Fees Defendant's Motion for Attorney's Fees is DENIED. While the settlement agreement provides for recovery of attorney's fees by a party that obtains a judgment in this action (taking into consideration mutuality of attorney's fees term), the settlement agreement does not provide for recovery of fees otherwise by any party. = (501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
